text: What you declare, you will achieve.
author: Anatole France

text: To accomplish great things, we must not only act, but also dream, not only plan, but also believe.
author: Anatole France

text: When you think you can't... revisit a previous triumph.
author: Jack Canfield

text: Sometimes things become possible if we want them bad enough.
author: T.S. Eliot

text: To be a leader, you must stand for something, or you will fall for anything.
author: Anthony Pagano

text: Don't you get it? This very second you could be doing something you love and dream about doing. So do it! NOW!
author: Unknown

text: Courage is facing your fears. Stupidity is fearing nothing.
author: Todd Bellemare

text: The spirit, the will to win, and the will to excel are the things that endure. These qualities are so much more important than the events that occur.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Victory is always possible for the person who refuses to stop fighting.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Great works are performed not by strength, but perseverance.
author: Dr. Samuel Johnson

text: It doesn't matter what you are thinking, or what fear you have, if you just do it! Action is the only thing that matters...I can see that at the end of my life, I am not going to look back and say, 'I wish I had taken more action'.
author: Diana von Welanetz Wentworth

text: People become successful the minute they decide to.
author: Harvey Mackay

text: Winning is not a 'sometime' thing. You don't win once in a awhile, you don't do things right once in awhile, you do them right all of the time. Winning is a habit, unfortunately, so is losing.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Good things come to those who hustle while they wait.
author: Unknown

text: The fastest way to pass your own expectations is to add passion to your labor.
author: Mike Litman

text: Your ideas are like diamonds...without the refining process, they are just a dirty rock, but by cutting away the impurities, they become priceless.
author: Paul Kearly

text: Success is predictable.
author: Brian Tracy

text: To be a champion, you have to believe in yourself when nobody else will.
author: Sugar Ray Robinson

text: Time, patience, and perseverance will accomplish all things.
author: Unknown

text: Society may predict, but only I can determine my destiny.
author: Clair Oliver

text: Successful people tend to become more successful because they are always thinking about their successes.
author: Brian Tracy

text: Accept the past for what it was. Acknowledge the present for what it is. Anticipate the future for what it can become.
author: Tracy L. McNair

text: To be a winner, all you have to give is all you have.
author: Unknown

text: If we are to achieve results never before accomplished, we must expect to employ methods never before attempted.
author: Francis Bacon

text: I have tried 99 times and have failed, but on the 100th time came success.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Success is more attitude than aptitude.
author: Unknown

text: Our mind is the most valuable possession that we have. The quality of our lives is, and will be, a reflection of how well we develop, train, and utilize this precious gift.
author: Brian Tracy

text: The past is over...forget it. The future holds hope...reach for it.
author: Charles R. Swindoll

text: There is always a better way.
author: Thomas Edison

text: Having conceived of his purpose, a man should mentally mark out a straight pathway to its achievement, looking neither to the right or to the left, but straight.
author: James Allen

text: The habit of persistence is the habit of victory.
author: Herbert Kaufman

text: People with goals succeed because they know where they are going.
author: Earl Nightingale

text: For I can do ALL things through Christ who gives me strength.
author: Philippians 4:13

text: Excellence is not being the best; it is doing your best.
author: Unknown

text: When everything feels like an uphill struggle, just think of the view from the top.
author: Unknown

text: To me, a winner is someone who recognizes their God-given talents, works his tail off to develop them into skills, and uses those skills to accomplish his goals. Even when I lost, I learned what my weaknesses were and I went out the next day to turn those weaknesses into strengths.
author: Larry Bird

text: The size of your success depends on the depth of your desire.
author: Unknown

text: Don't limit your challenges; challenge your limits.
author: Unknown

text: Each day we must strive for constant and never ending improvement.
author: Anthony Robbins

text: If you have a burning desire and a plan to take action, there is absolutely nothing you cannot achieve.
author: Thomas J. Vilord

text: Approach the start of each day with something in mind and end the day with one word...DONE.
author: Unknown

text: Dreamers look into the future and see promise. Those who do not dream only see the future.
author: D. Elder

text: Life is only what we choose to make it.
author: Unknown

text: Happiness is the highest level of success.
author: Unknown

text: In every problem there is a hidden treasure inside. It's your job to find it.
author: Unknown

text: Fear is met and destroyed with courage. Again and again when the struggle seems hopeless and all opportunity lost, the one with a little more courage, and a little more effort will have victory.
author: James F. Bell

text: Anyone who has never made a mistake has never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Without ambition no conquests are made, and no business created. Ambition is the root of all achievement.
author: James Champy

text: Cause change and lead; accept change and survive; resist change and die.
author: Ray Norda

text: 80% of success is showing up.
author: Woody Allen

text: To change bad habits, we must study the habits of successful role models.
author: Jack Canfield

text: He who dares, wins.
author: Winston Churchill

text: Trust in yourself. Your perceptions are often far more accurate than you are willing to believe.
author: Claudia Black

text: Imagination rules the world.
author: Napoleon Bonaparte

text: If you think you can or if you think you can't, either way you are right.
author: Anthony Robbins

text: God created all men equal. Why do some accomplish far greater accomplishments then others? Because they had a vision, a desire, and they took action.
author: Thomas J. Vilord

text: We can do anything we want to if we stick to it long enough.
author: Helen Keller

text: Some men give up their designs when they have almost reached their goal, while others obtain a victory by exerting, at the last moment, more vigorous efforts than ever before.
author: Herodotus

text: Motivation is like food for the brain. You cannot get enough in one sitting. It needs continual and regular refills.
author: Peter Davies

text: Only those who risk going too far can possibly find out how far one can go.
author: T.S. Eliot

text: The achievement of one goal should be the starting point of another.
author: Alexander Graham Bell

text: Concentrated thoughts produce desired results.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: People are anxious to improve their circumstances, but are unwilling to improve themselves. That is why they remain bound.
author: James Allen

text: Genius is divine perseverance. Genius I cannot have, but perseverance all can have.
author: Woodrow Wilson

text: Money never starts an idea; it's the idea that starts the money.
author: Mark Victor Hansen

text: I am not just here to make a living; I am here to make a life.
author: Helice Bridges

text: Life is short. Focus from this day forward on making a difference.
author: Unknown

text: Ideas are a dime a dozen, they are worthless, but people who put their ideas into action are priceless.
author: Unknown

text: You may be disappointed if you fail, but you are doomed if you do not try.
author: Beverly Sills

text: It's not whether you get knocked down; it's whether you get back up.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: Success is the prize for those who stand true to their ideas.
author: John S. Hinds

text: I would rather fail in a cause that would ultimately succeed, than succeed in a cause that would ultimately fail.
author: Woodrow Wilson

text: Success is neither magical nor mysterious. Success is the natural consequence of consistently applying the basic fundamentals.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The path to success is to take massive determined action.
author: Anthony Robbins

text: I know the price of success: dedication, hard work, and an unremitting devotion to the things you want to see happen.
author: Frank Lloyd Wright

text: Your dreams minus your doubts equal your true worth.
author: Unknown

text: The man who said he never had a chance, never took one.
author: Unknown

text: Dream your wildest dreams and you will live a wild life.
author: Unknown

text: Success comes to those who dare to begin.
author: Unknown

text: Your success is only limited by your desire.
author: Unknown

text: I have failed over and over again. That is why I succeed.
author: Michael Jordan

text: Read something positive every night and listen to something helpful every morning.
author: Tom Hopkins

text: Never stop learning. If you learn one new thing everyday, you will overcome 99% of your competition.
author: Joe Carlozo

text: Winning doesn't make you a better person, but being a better person will make you a winner.
author: Unknown

text: I do believe I am special. My special gift is my vision, my commitment, and my willingness to do whatever it takes.
author: Anthony Robbins

text: The starting point of all achievement is desire. Keep this constantly in mind. Weak desire brings weak results, just as a small amount of fire makes a small amount of heat.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Man is what he believes.
author: Anton Chekov

text: It is the mind that makes good or ill. That which makes us happy or sad; rich or poor.
author: Edmund Spencer

text: It's a funny thing about life; if you refuse to accept anything but the best, you often get it.
author: W. Somerset Manghan

text: With each choice you make, you create your life.
author: Unknown

text: Never give up! Failure and rejection are only the first step to succeeding.
author: Jimmy Valvano

text: Believe in yourself and you will be unstoppable.
author: Emily Guay

text: Failure is merely part of the process necessary for success.
author: Unknown

text: The door to success is the one marked PUSH.
author: Unknown

text: There are no failures in life, only those who give up to soon.
author: Unknown

text: Don't wish for it...work for it!
author: Unknown

text: He who conquers others is strong. He who conquers himself is mighty.
author: Lao Tzu

text: Don't be afraid to go after what you want to do and what you want to be, and don't be afraid to pay the price to get it.
author: Unknown

text: The best way to accomplish something is to just do it, and then find the courage afterwards.
author: Unknown

text: JUST DO IT!
author: Nike

text: Never let your fears be the boundaries of your dreams.
author: Unknown

text: Think BIG! You are going to be thinking anyway, so think BIG!
author: Donald Trump

text: We grow great by dreams. All big men are dreamers. They see things in the soft haze of a spring day or in the red fire of a long winters evening. Some of us let these great dreams die, but others nourish and protect them; they nurse them through bad days until they bring them to the sunshine and the light that always comes to those who sincerely hope that their dreams will come true.
author: Woodrow Wilson
